title: No Embeddium Menu
description: A simple mod which brings back Minecraft's graphic menu instead of the Embeddium's one.
body:
# No Embeddium Menu!

This simple mod disables the Embedium main menu and restores the classic Minecraft graphic menu

# Want to be updated?
Just contact me through my website: https://javivi.dev

# Consider donating ☕

https://ko-fi.com/javividev
